question: Is the dense red smoke and fog completely removed from the stage environment?
Is the lighting color temperature changed from intense red to a clear cool white?
Is a drummer and drum kit clearly visible and recognizable at the back of the stage?
Is an LED video wall clearly visible behind the stage?
Do the stage lights project clear illumination without visible scattering through haze?
Are the three musicians in the foreground preserved in their original poses and positions?
Are the instruments (guitars) held by the musicians structurally intact and recognizable?
Are the stage equipment elements (microphone stands, amplifiers) preserved in their original positions?
Is the newly revealed background (drummer, LED wall) visually consistent with the stage perspective and depth?
Are the edges of the foreground musicians clean and free from residual red fog or halos?
Is the image free of visible inpainting artifacts (smudging, banding, distortion) in the revealed areas?
